overview: Regenerative medicine clinic offering platelet-rich plasma (PRP) and bone marrow-derived cell treatments (BMAC) for joint pain, arthritis, and connective tissue injuries. Also provides testosterone replacement therapy and GLP-1 weight-loss programs.
highlights: Image-guided ultrasound and fluoroscopy for injection placement
targetAudience: Active adults in the Denver area seeking non-surgical treatment for joint pain and arthritis.
